name: Mulch Calculator
seo_title: Mulch Calculator ? Cubic Yards, Bags & Coverage
seo_description: Garden mulching project? Enter area dimensions and desired depth to get volume in cubic metres, cubic yards, and number of bags needed. Includes compaction estimate.
description: Mulch Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Enter your dataset as comma-separated numbers
For each value: subtract the mean, square the result
For population std dev: divide by N, then take square root
For sample std dev: divide by (N-1), then take square root
mistakes: Using population formula when you have a sample — dividing by N instead of N-1
Reporting standard deviation without the mean — they belong together
Confusing standard deviation with standard error — SE = SD / sqrt(n)
result_context: The standard deviation is {deviation}. About 68% of values fall within {rango}.
formula_display: σ = sqrt(Σ(x-μ)²/N) population; s = sqrt(Σ(x-x̄)²/(n-1)) sample
desc: Mulch Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
